eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Ouray, CO; at 3:48 PM on JUN 28, 2026 Effective until 9:48 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a public safety message from Ouray County Emergency Management. There is a MANDATORY EVACUATION ORDER for homes between Pecks trailer park and Cedar Hill Cemetery (EAST of Hwy 550) . Collect important documents and medications and LEAVE NOW. Evacuate to the Ridgway secondary School. This is a public safety message from Ouray County Emergency Management. There is a MANDATORY EVACUATION ORDER for homes between Pecks trailer park and Cedar Hill Cemetery (EAST of Hwy 550) . Collect important documents and medications and LEAVE NOW. Evacuate to the Ridgway secondary School.
